zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Grey於1235年出生在英國德比夏爾藍德時，她的父親John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby31歲，母親Emma Glanville28歲。她於1256年與William Huntingfield在英國德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年在英國諾福爾可巴可頓享年29歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可門達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Grey于1235年出生在英国德比夏爾藍德时，她的父亲John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby31岁，母亲Emma Glanville28岁。她于1256年与William Huntingfield在英国德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年在英国諾福爾可巴可頓享年29岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可門達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Grey was born in 1235, in Shirland, Derbyshire, England, her father, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, was 31 and her mother, Emma Glanville, was 28. She married William Huntingfield in 1256, in Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1264, in Bacton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Mendham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Grey est née en 1235, à Shirland, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Emma Glanville, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Huntingfield en 1256, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1264, à Bacton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Mendham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Grey 1235 in Shirland, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby 31 und ihre Mutter Emma Glanville 28. Sie hat 1256 in Derby, Derbyshire, England William Huntingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1264 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Bacton, Norfolk, England und wurde in Mendham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Grey è nata il nel 1235 nel Shirland, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Emma Glanville, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Huntingfield nel 1256, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1264, nel Bacton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Mendham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Greyが1235年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルランドで生まれた時，父John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derbyは31歳，母Emma Glanvilleは28歳であった。1256年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでWilliam Huntingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年にイギリスノーフォルクバクトンで29歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクメンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Grey(이)가 1235년 영국 더비실르 실를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Glanville(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 William Huntingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 영국 노르폴크 바크턴에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 멘드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Grey nasceu em 1235, em Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Emma Glanville, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Huntingfield em 1256, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1264, em Bacton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Mendham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Grey родилась в 1235 г. в местности ширланд, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Emma Glanville, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Huntingfield в 1256 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1264 г. в местности бактон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности мендхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Grey nació en 1235, en Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Emma Glanville, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Huntingfield en 1256, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1264, en Bacton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Mendham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
